items.title: CLAUDE CODE COST DEBATE
items.description: **Debunking viral claim** that Anthropic loses $5k per Claude Code user: - Original claim spread widely - This analysis shows the math doesn't add up - Actual costs likely far lower - **Context:** Understanding economics of AI coding tools **Why relevant:** You're learning Claude Code - understanding its business model matters for long-term viability.

items.title: Agentic Critical Training (arXiv:2603.08706)
items.description: - Authors: Weize Liu, Minghui Liu, et al. (UMD/Maryland) - **NEW training methodology for agents** - Focus: Critical thinking capabilities - **Relevance:** Training better reasoning agents

items.title: RetroAgent: From Solving to Evolving via Retrospective Dual Intrinsic Feedback (arXiv:2603.08561)
items.description: - Authors: Xiaoying Zhang, Zichen Liu, et al. - **Key insight:** Agents that learn from their own past actions - Retrospective self-improvement loop - **Application:** Self-evolving agent systems

items.title: 🏢 IronEngine: Towards General AI Assistant (arXiv:2603.08425)
items.description: - Author: Xi Mo - **Goal:** General-purpose AI assistant architecture - **Relevance:** Foundational framework research - **Note:** Aligns with OpenClaw's vision

items.title: 🗺️ A Hierarchical Error-Corrective Graph Framework for Autonomous Agents with LLM-Based Action Generation (arXiv:2603.08388)
items.description: - Authors: Cong Cao, Jingyao Zhang, Kun Tong - **Innovation:** Error correction via graph structures - Hierarchical agent action planning - **Application:** More reliable autonomous agents

items.title: M³-ACE: Rectifying Visual Perception in Multimodal Math Reasoning via Multi-Agentic Context Engineering (arXiv:2603.08369)
items.description: - Authors: Peijin Xie, Zhen Xu, Bingquan Liu, Baoxun Wang - **Focus:** Multi-agent collaboration for math problems - Visual + language reasoning combined - **Pattern:** Multi-agent systems for complex tasks

items.title: Agentic Neurosymbolic Collaboration for Mathematical Discovery (arXiv:2603.08322)
items.description: - Authors: Hai Xia, Carla P. Gomes, Bart Selman, Stefan Szeider - **Breakthrough:** Combining neural + symbolic AI via agents - Focus: Combinatorial design discovery - **Significance:** Agents advancing mathematics research - **Team:** Cornell + Vienna heavyweights

items.title: 🎯 Agentic Engineering Patterns by Simon Willison (VIRAL - 447+ points on HN)
items.description: **MUST-READ GUIDE** - Community is spiking on this: - **Practical patterns** for building AI agents - From Simon Willison (trusted AI observer, Django creator) - Went viral on HN (379 → 447 points in 4 minutes) - Exactly what you need for AI-native engineering **Why this matters:** - Real engineering patterns, not theory - Community validation (viral = people needed this) - Directly applicable to...
